extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY Jai attacked inside final 5km on Marmolada with Kemner pacing, dropped CARAPAZ who cracked catastrophically to lose 1:25 and the Maglia Rosa.
tactical_patterns: Kemner planted in early 15-rider break as satellite rider, crucial when Hindley bridged with 3km remaining for pacing support.
Carapaz defended 3-second lead passively until Hindley attacked, revealing he was already broken rather than tactical choice.
Bahrain placed both Novak and Kemner in break, dual satellite strategy paid off with Novak chasing stage, Kemner supporting GC.

rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: launched first offensive inside 5km showing superior form recognition, bridged to planted teammate Kemner for crucial pacing
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: catastrophic collapse losing 1:25 on final climb despite only needing to limit losses to 17 seconds before TT
rider_signals.KEMNER Leonard: positive: executed satellite breakaway role perfectly, paced Hindley after being caught with 3km remaining on Marmolada
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: passed imploding Carapaz to move within striking distance of podium at 1:51 despite being 1:05 down pre-stage
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: distanced early in final 5km climb, unable to defend position in final Giro despite fresh legs assumption
